problem_id: Two-Way Interoperability between the Single Window System and Department Systems
team_name: SyncBridge — Bidirectional Event-Driven Interoperability Layer for Karnataka Government Systems
summary: Design a bidirectional event-driven interoperability layer for Karnataka Government Systems using UBID as the common join key.
optimization_claims: idempotency keys ensure that retry storms never produce duplicate writes in target systems
conflict detection with a configurable resolution policy means that simultaneous updates are handled explicitly rather than producing silent data corruption
constraints_addressed: UBID is the only reliable join key
